title: Maui Iron Golem
description: Changes the Iron Golem model to Maui from Moana
body:
# Maui Iron Golem Texture Pack

So what can I say except you're welcome!

The textures I used are from this [skin](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/maui/)

## Features
- Compatible with all versions of Minecraft that support Optifine.
- Works seamlessly with Fabric on versions that include the EMF (Entity Model Features) mod.

### Compatibility
- **Optifine**: Compatible with all versions that support Optifine. [Download Optifine](https://optifine.net/)
- **EMF Mod for Fabric**: Works with all versions of Fabric that include the EMF mod. [Download EMF Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

## Screenshots
![Maui Iron Golem - Image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R8xdO2k1/images/5bad8fba4e213bc94f023ac994246b4c0239e0c1.png)
![Maui Iron Golem - Image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R8xdO2k1/images/139da546d16831f22643279c3635fee412764cdc.png)
![Maui Iron Golem - Image 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R8xdO2k1/images/524133f315f1559b6648ce2b3ba60946ff38c922.png)

## Installation
1. Download and install Optifine or Fabric with the EMF mod, depending on your Minecraft version.
2. Download the Maui Iron Golem Texture Pack.
3. Place the texture pack in the "resourcepacks" folder in your Minecraft directory.
4. Activate the texture pack in the Minecraft game settings.
